OPPOSITION TO G B & E CONSTRUCTION, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JADE GROUP, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT G B&E CONSTRUCTION, INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 25, 2014 TO GIVE JADE GROUP, LLC THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. JADE GROUP, LLC MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JUNE 13, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE DEMURRER WILL BE SUSTAINED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar Aug-06-2014 Continued To Oct-01-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-25-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sean Kane, Esq., 858.625.3900, for plaintiff Jade Group, LLC.
Carolyn Lee, Esq., 415.777.1688, for defendant GB&E Construction, Inc.

RULING: No argument. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT G B & E CONSTRUCTION, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend in part and overruled in part. As to the first cause of action for negligence, the demurrer is overruled as the complaint adequately pleads the elements of this cause of action and is not fatally uncertain. As to the second cause of action for equitable indemnity, the demurrer is overruled because the complaint adequately pleads that Defendant's negligent conduct contributed to Plaintiff having to settle with the individual homeowners. As to the third cause of action for breach of contract, the demurrer is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. The complaint does not adequately plead the material terms of the contract. Additionally, the complaint does not specify whether the contract entered into with Defendant was written or oral. (CCP sec. 430.10(g).) As to the fourth cause of action for breach of implied warranty, the demurrer is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. Because the demurrer does not adequately plead breach of contract, it follows that the complaint does not state a cause of action for breach of implied warranty. The Court did not consider Defendant's evidence and arguments raised for the first time in reply. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-13-2014 Continued To Jun-25-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT G B&E CONSTRUCTION, INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to June 25, 2014 to give Jade Group, LLC the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Jade Group, LLC must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 13, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the demurrer will be sustained. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
